prompt: A close-up portrait of an {argument name="character description" default="anime girl with shoulder-length wavy hair and a gentle smile"}, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="school uniform with a bow tie"}. The image is a hand-drawn sketch on a glossy white whiteboard, created entirely with a {argument name="marker color" default="blue"} dry-erase marker. The art style features sketchy, varying line weights and rough marker shading, capturing a casual yet highly skilled anime illustration. Subtle light reflections on the top right of the whiteboard surface enhance the realistic photograph-of-a-drawing aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="character description" default="留着齐肩波浪卷发、面带温柔微笑的动漫少女"} 的特写肖像，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="系着领结的校服"}。图像是手绘在光面白板上的素描，完全使用 {argument name="marker color" default="蓝色"} 白板笔创作。艺术风格呈现出草图感、多变的线条粗细以及粗犷的马克笔阴影，捕捉到一种随性却又极其精湛的动漫插画效果。白板表面右上角细微的光线反射，增强了“拍摄画作”的真实感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 白板马克笔动漫素描：生成一张逼真的照片，展示用彩色白板笔在白板上绘制的动漫角色素描。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, anime, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
